name: @cf-worker-apps/notion-gateway
description: Central Notion integration gateway — holds OAuth tokens for connected Notion workspaces; consumer apps (PM, MyPanel, …) call in via HMAC-signed JSON.

scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:api && npm run deploy:web
scripts.//db:env: DATABASE_URL must be set from pass-cli item 'Allenlabs PostgreSQL Hetzner' (the allenlabs DB connection string).
scripts.db:migrate: psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f drizzle-pg/0001_initial.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f drizzle-pg/0002_webhooks.sql
